title: Take Me To Your Heart
group_key: take me to your heart|michael learns to rock

lyrics.text: Hiding from the rain and snow
Trying to forget but I won't let go
lyrics.translation: 想要忘记,但又不愿放手

lyrics.text: Looking at a crowded street
Listening to my own heart beat
So many people all around the world
Tell me where do I find someone like you girl
lyrics.translation: 在哪里才能找到像你这样的女孩

lyrics.text: Take me to your heart take me to your soul
Give me your hand before I'm old
lyrics.translation: 在我还没有衰老的时候让我紧握你的手

lyrics.text: Show me what love is - haven't got a clue
lyrics.translation: 告诉我爱的真谛--我还对爱毫无概念

lyrics.text: Show me that wonders can be true
lyrics.translation: 让我看到奇迹可以成真

lyrics.text: They say nothing lasts forever
lyrics.translation: 都说没有什么是永久的

lyrics.text: We're only here today
Love is now or never
Bring me far away
Take me to your heart take me to your soul
Give me your hand and hold me
Show me what love is - be my guiding star
lyrics.translation: 告诉我爱的真谛,做我的指路明灯

lyrics.text: It's easy take me to your heart
lyrics.translation: 一切都很简单,把我带进你的心吧

lyrics.text: Standing on a mountain high
Looking at the moon through a clear blue sky
I should go and see some friends
But they don't really comprehend
lyrics.translation: 但是他们不会真正理解我的感受

lyrics.text: Don't need too much talking without saying anything
All I need is someone who makes me wanna sing
lyrics.translation: 我只需要一个让我想歌唱的人

lyrics.text: Take me to your heart take me to your soul
Give me your hand before I'm old
lyrics.translation: 在我还没有衰老的时候让我紧握你的手

lyrics.text: Show me what love is - haven't got a clue
lyrics.translation: 告诉我爱的真谛--我还对爱毫无概念

lyrics.text: Show me that wonders can be true
lyrics.translation: 让我看到奇迹可以成真

lyrics.text: They say nothing lasts forever
lyrics.translation: 都说没有什么是永久的

Show me what love is - be my guiding star
